action: Universal abnormal-event capture → learn → retro → todo pipeline. Three phases. PHASE A (immediate, persistence regression fix): cycles 40+ retro agent writes handoff-retrospective.json:lessonIds[] but skips writing .evolve/instincts/lessons/<id>.yaml. merge-lesson-into-state.sh exits 2 (INTEGRITY_FAIL); orchestrator persona at agents/evolve-orchestrator.md:150-163 does NOT check MERGE_RC. state.json:instinctSummary[] frozen at cycle-38. Fix: (a) agents/evolve-retrospective.md ~lines 135-139 strengthen YAML-write MUST-FIRST contract with on-disk verification; (b) agents/evolve-orchestrator.md add MERGE_RC=$? check (exit 2 on integrity_fail, log WARN on other non-zero); (c) scripts/lifecycle/phase-gate.sh add gate_retrospective_to_complete() verifying handoff lessonIds[] → YAML files 1:1. PHASE B (broader, OPERATOR DIRECTIVE): every abnormal cycle event must flow capture→learn→retro→todo. Today watchdog stalls, subagent dispatch errors, ship refusals, cost overruns, persistence fails, counter non-advance all terminate cycles WITHOUT firing retro. Fix: canonical artifact .evolve/runs/cycle-N/abnormal-events.jsonl (schema {event_type, timestamp, source_phase, severity, details, remediation_hint}); wire detectors in subagent-run.sh (worktree-breach + dispatch errors), phase-watchdog.sh (stalls), ship.sh (refusals), merge-lesson-into-state.sh (persistence fails), claude.sh (cost overruns), dispatcher (counter non-advance) to append events; expand gate_audit_to_retrospective to also fire retro when abnormal-events.jsonl non-empty (PASS cycles with abnormal events MUST run retro); evolve-retrospective.md adds Step 1.5 to read abnormal-events.jsonl and emit one lesson per unique event_type; reconcile-carryover-todos.sh promotes each abnormal-event-derived lesson to a HIGH/MEDIUM carryoverTodos[] entry with _inbox_source='abnormal-event:<type>'. PHASE C (one-time recovery): scripts/utility/backfill-lessons.sh extracts YAML blocks from .evolve/runs/archive/cycle-{40,41,42}-*/retrospective-report.md, atomically writes to .evolve/instincts/lessons/, appends to state.json:instinctSummary[]. Idempotent (skip existing ids). Tests: scripts/tests/lesson-persistence-test.sh, scripts/tests/abnormal-event-capture-test.sh. Docs: docs/architecture/retrospective-pipeline.md, docs/architecture/abnormal-event-capture.md.
evidence_pointer: https://github.com/mickeyyaya/evolve-loop/commit/183406e — cycle 42 of relaunch ran 3 attempts; archive .evolve/runs/archive/cycle-42-20260514T034740Z/retrospective-report.md has detailed runtime-vs-shell layer diagnosis but lesson not persisted
operator_note: Operator directive: 'any abnormal behavior happened during the cycle must be capture and learned and trigger the retrospective to deal it in the Todo list which can be fixed in the future cycle'. Today only audit-verdict-WARN/FAIL fires retro (v8.45.0); broader events (watchdog stalls, dispatch errors, ship refusals, persistence fails, cost overruns, counter non-advance) silently terminate cycles without learning. The persistence regression itself (.evolve/instincts/lessons/ frozen at cycle-38) is the canonical example: the system observed the failure but couldn't remember it. Plan file: /Users/danleemh/.claude/plans/investigate-when-the-pipeline-jazzy-planet.md
